title: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 03 2024
section_path: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 03 2024
section_path_text: MMi Daily Iron Ore Index Report January 03 2024
summary:
Main
in Chinese iron ore and steelmaking prices 03/01/2024
DCE iron ore futures rose largely today by 2.83%. Traders ship according to market condtions；steel mills inquiries decreased, resulting in poor purchasing enthusiasm. PBF at Shandong port dealt 1062-1065 yuan/mt; increased 12-15 yuan/mt over yesterday.
